# SaaSyBase

> A production-ready SaaS boilerplate for vibecoders. Built with Next.js 16, dual auth (Clerk/NextAuth), multi-payment providers (Stripe/Paystack/Paddle/Razorpay), Prisma ORM, and a full admin dashboard.

## What is SaaSyBase?

SaaSyBase is a complete SaaS starter kit that handles the infrastructure so you can focus on building your product. Auth, payments, billing, teams, email, admin dashboards, blog, support tickets, and more are already wired and ready to go.

## Quick Start

```
cp .env.example .env.local
npm install
npx prisma migrate dev --name init
npx prisma db seed
npm run dev
```

## Core Features

- Dual auth provider system (Clerk or NextAuth) — switchable via AUTH_PROVIDER env var
- Multi-payment provider architecture (Stripe, Paystack, Paddle, Razorpay) — switchable via PAYMENT_PROVIDER env var
- Three-tier token system (paid, free, shared team tokens)
- Organization/team management with seat limits and token caps
- Subscription lifecycle management (create, upgrade, downgrade, cancel, proration)
- Feature gating behind paid plans
- Coupon/discount system with per-plan restrictions
- Full admin dashboard with user management, analytics, and settings
- Blog CMS with categories and SEO
- Editable site pages (Terms, Privacy, etc.)
- Email template system with variable interpolation
- In-app notification system
- Support ticket system
- Theme/branding designer (no code changes needed)
- PDF invoice and refund receipt generation
- Rate limiting (database-backed)
- Moderator roles with per-section access
- Google Analytics 4 integration
- First-party visit tracking
- S3/CDN file storage
- 90+ regression tests (Vitest) and E2E tests (Playwright)

## Tech Stack

- Framework: Next.js 16 (App Router)
- Auth: Clerk or NextAuth (Auth.js v5)
- Payments: Stripe, Paystack, Paddle, Razorpay
- Database: Prisma ORM with SQLite (dev) / PostgreSQL (prod)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- Rich Text: TipTap
- Email: Nodemailer or Resend
- Validation: Zod
- Testing: Vitest + Playwright
- PDF: pdf-lib
- Analytics: Google Analytics 4

## Architecture

The codebase uses a provider abstraction pattern for both auth and payments. Business logic lives in lib/, route handlers in app/api/, pages in app/, and reusable components in components/. The database schema has 25+ models managed by Prisma.

Provider selection is environment-driven:
- AUTH_PROVIDER=clerk or AUTH_PROVIDER=nextauth
- PAYMENT_PROVIDER=stripe, paystack, paddle, or razorpay

## Key Directories

- app/ — Next.js pages and API routes
- lib/ — Server-side business logic (auth, payments, tokens, email, subscriptions)
- lib/auth-provider/ — Auth abstraction layer
- lib/payment/ — Payment abstraction layer with 4 provider implementations
- components/ — React components (ui/, admin/, dashboard/, billing/, checkout/, team/)
- prisma/ — Database schema and migrations
- tests/ — 90+ unit tests and 3 E2E test specs
- scripts/ — Operational scripts (backfill, admin, validation)
- docs/ — Internal architecture documentation

## Documentation Files

- README.md — Full feature documentation and setup guide
- CLAUDE.md — AI agent context and coding rules
- INSTRUCTIONS.md — Developer guide for extending the codebase
- AGENTS.md — Specialized AI agent role definitions
- PATTERNS.md — Codebase patterns and conventions reference
- TECH_STACK.md — Complete technology stack with versions and rationale
- ARCHITECTURE.md — System architecture with diagrams and data flows
- CONTRIBUTING.md — Contribution workflow and guidelines
- docs/adding-payment-providers.md — Guide for adding new payment providers
- docs/token-usage-and-deduction.md — Token system integration guide

## API Routes

Key API endpoint groups:
- /api/checkout — Payment checkout session creation
- /api/webhooks/payments — Centralized webhook ingress (auto-detects provider)
- /api/billing/ — Cancel, undo cancel, invoice, customer portal
- /api/user/profile — User profile with token breakdown
- /api/user/spend-tokens — User-scoped token deduction
- /api/internal/spend-tokens — Server-to-server token deduction
- /api/admin/ — Admin CRUD operations
- /api/support/tickets — Support ticket management
- /api/notifications — In-app notifications
- /api/cron/process-expiry — Subscription expiry automation
- /api/health — Health check endpoint

## Database Models

Core models: User, Plan, PlanPrice, Subscription, Payment, Organization, OrganizationMembership, OrganizationInvite, Coupon, CouponRedemption, SupportTicket, TicketReply, EmailLog, EmailTemplate, Notification, Setting, SitePage, BlogCategory, VisitLog, SystemLog, AdminActionLog, RateLimitBucket

## Environment Variables

Required groups:
- Core: DATABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
- Auth: AUTH_PROVIDER + provider-specific keys
- Payments: PAYMENT_PROVIDER + provider-specific keys
- Security: ENCRYPTION_SECRET, INTERNAL_API_TOKEN
- Email: SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS

See .env.example for the complete reference.
